opportunities.description:
[HIRING] Part-Time Remote Finance Admin (Evening Flexibility) — $15–$18/hr

We’re looking to bring on 2–3 detail-oriented people for a long-term part-time remote admin role focused on invoice checking and spreadsheet updates. This is ideal for someone looking for consistent side income alongside a full-time job, freelance work, studies, or other commitments. The workload is steady, flexible, and mainly handled during evening hours.
